_meta.notes: Pin names follow PCGEx label conventions. Points processors have In:'Points' Out:'Points'. Cluster processors have In:'Vtx'+'Edges' Out:'Vtx'+'Edges'. Path processors have In:'Paths' Out:'Paths'. All UPROPERTY fields marked PCG_Overridable can be driven by upstream attributes.

Cluster Diagrams.description: Build graph structures from point clouds using geometric algorithms

nodes.description: Builds a 2D Delaunay triangulation cluster from input points, with optional Urquhart graph extraction.

output_pins.name: Sites
output_pins.tooltip: Delaunay triangle sites (centroids), only if bOutputSites=true

bUrquhart.tooltip: Remove longest edge of each triangle to produce Urquhart graph

bMarkHull.tooltip: Write hull flag attribute to vertices

nodes.description: Builds a 3D Delaunay tetrahedralization cluster from input points.
Builds a 2D Voronoi diagram cluster from input points.

Method.tooltip: How to compute Voronoi cell center position

ExpandBounds.tooltip: Expand input bounds for diagram generation

nodes.description: Builds a 3D Voronoi diagram cluster from input points.
Builds a 2D convex hull cluster or path from input points.

bOutputClusters.tooltip: Output hull as cluster (vtx+edges) instead of paths

nodes.description: Builds a 3D convex hull cluster from input points.
Builds the dual graph of a Delaunay/Voronoi cluster (sites become vertices, adjacency becomes edges).
Builds a cell-based diagram cluster from input points.

Clusters.description: Operations on cluster data (Vtx + Edges graphs)

nodes.description: Builds a cluster from custom graph builder logic defined in Blueprint/C++ on actors.
Connects separate clusters into a single graph by bridging nearest points between them.
Merges overlapping clusters by fusing vertices and detecting point-edge/edge-edge intersections.
Converts static mesh geometry into cluster data (vertices and edges).
Stamps/instances cluster data at each target point location with transform inheritance.
Computes graph centrality metrics (betweenness, closeness, degree, eigenvector, Katz) and writes them as vertex attributes.
Fixes a consistent direction for edge start/end endpoints based on configurable rules.
Packs each cluster (vtx+edges) into a single point data object for transport/storage.
Unpacks packed cluster data back into separate Vtx and Edges point collections.
Merges selected vertices in a cluster, collapsing edges.
Simplifies cluster topology by removing low-connectivity vertices.
Removes invalid or duplicate edges and isolated vertices from clusters.
Partitions cluster vertices into separate output collections.
Filters cluster vertices using composable filter chains.
Ensures each cluster has its own unique point data (deep copy).
Breaks cluster topology into individual paths or edge chains.
Cuts cluster edges using path intersections.
Converts path point data into cluster data (vtx + edges).
Removes edges from a cluster using pluggable refinement strategies (MST, shortest/longest, filters).
Applies spring-based relaxation to cluster vertices, evening out edge lengths.
Decomposes a cluster into sub-clusters based on connectivity analysis.

Cluster Meta.description: Write metadata and properties on cluster vertices and edges

nodes.description: Writes computed edge properties (length, direction, etc.) as attributes on edge points.
Writes computed vertex properties (adjacency count, etc.) as attributes on vertex points.
Samples and blends attribute values from neighboring vertices in the cluster graph.

Pathfinding.description: A* and growth-based pathfinding through clusters

nodes.description: Finds shortest paths between seed and goal points through cluster edges using A*/Dijkstra.
Finds a path through cluster edges visiting a sequence of plot waypoints in order.
Grows paths from seed points through a cluster graph using iterative directional expansion.
Finds closed cell contours in a cluster by walking edges from seed points.
Finds paths between seeds and goals using the UE navigation mesh (no cluster required).

Flood Fill.description: Flood fill and BFS operations on clusters

nodes.description: Performs flood-fill diffusion from seed points through a cluster, writing depth/order/distance attributes.
Computes BFS traversal depth from seed points and writes it as a vertex attribute.
Smooths path points using pluggable smoothing methods with configurable influence and amount.
Subdivides path segments by distance or count, inserting interpolated sub-points.
Resamples a path at uniform intervals by distance or count.
Offsets a path laterally by a configurable distance with mitre/smooth adjustment.
Bevels path corners with configurable profile (line, arc, custom), width, and subdivision.
Splits paths at filtered points into multiple sub-paths.
Computes and writes arrive/leave tangent vectors for each path point (for spline generation).
Creates spline components or spline data from path points.
Writes path metadata (length, point count, closed loop flag) as point attributes.
Reverses the order of points in each path.
Extrudes/solidifies a 2D path into 3D geometry points.
Samples a spline into a PCGEx path point collection.
Spawns spline mesh components along paths for visual representation.
Removes near-collinear points from paths to simplify geometry.
Detects and inserts points at path self-intersections.

Sampling.description: Sample and transfer data between point sets, surfaces, splines, and textures

nodes.description: Samples and blends attributes from the nearest target points within range, with configurable weighting.
Raycasts from each point to find the nearest surface hit, writing location/normal/distance.
Samples the nearest path segments for each point, writing distance/transform/inside status.
Samples the nearest bounding boxes from target points, writing weighted distance/transform.
Samples texture data at UV coordinates for each point.
Removes overlapping points from a collection based on bounds overlap testing.
Discards entire point collections that overlap with others based on bounds testing.
Samples the nearest spline for each point, writing closest location/distance/tangent.
Tests whether points are inside closed path regions.

Spatial.description: Spatial operations on point clouds (fusion, relaxation, projection, bounds)

nodes.description: Fuses nearby points within a tolerance distance, blending their attributes.
Applies Lloyd relaxation iterations to spread points more uniformly in 3D space.
Applies Lloyd relaxation iterations in 2D projected space.
Connects points into a cluster using pluggable probe strategies (radius, direction, etc.).
Projects points onto a 2D plane, flattening one axis.
Normalizes point positions into a 0-1 range within their bounding box.
Converts point collections into bounding box point representations.
Moves the pivot/origin of point collections.
Counts nearby collocated points and writes the count as an attribute.
Packs points into a bounding volume using 3D bin packing with configurable seed/split strategies.
3D bin packing variant with full volumetric space partitioning.
Arranges points in configurable grid/radial/custom layouts.

Bounds.description: Bounding box analysis and conversion utilities

nodes.description: Generates corner/edge/face points from bounding boxes.
Generates axis-aligned points from bounding boxes.
Finds the closest point on a bounding box surface for each input point.
Finds the best matching axis for point distributions within bounds.

Meta / Attributes.description: Attribute manipulation, sorting, partitioning, and state writing

nodes.description: Writes point index, collection index, and entry count as attributes.
Remaps attribute values through clamping and range remapping with per-component overrides.
Sorts points within each collection by configurable attribute rules.

Rules.tooltip: Ordered list of sort rules (attribute + direction)

nodes.description: Splits point collections into separate outputs based on attribute value buckets.
Evaluates point state factory chains and writes results as an int64 flag bitmask attribute.
Applies 3D procedural noise to an attribute with configurable blend mode.
Computes a hash from one or more attributes and writes it as a new attribute.
Computes statistics (min, max, mean, etc.) of attributes and writes them as new attributes.
Blends attributes between two point collections using configurable blending modes.
Regenerates the random seed on each point for downstream stochastic operations.
Sorts points using pluggable modular sorting rule factories.
Generates 2D/3D procedural shapes (circles, polygons, spirals, etc.) from shape factory inputs.

Clipper2.description: Polygon boolean and offset operations via Clipper2 library

nodes.description: Performs 2D polygon boolean operations (union, intersection, difference, XOR) on path collections.
Offsets/inflates 2D polygon paths using Clipper2 library.
Clips 2D polygon paths against a rectangular region.

Topology.description: Surface generation and mesh topology from clusters and paths

nodes.description: Creates a triangle surface mesh from cluster cell topology for collision or visualization.
Creates a triangle surface from closed path contours.
Creates a triangle surface from point cloud data.
Triangulates 2D polygon paths using Clipper2 for surface generation.
Converts UDynamicMesh data into cluster vertex/edge data.
Spawns dynamic mesh actors from generated surface data.

Tensors.description: Vector field / tensor-based path extrusion and transformation

nodes.description: Extrudes paths from seed points by iteratively sampling stacked tensor/vector fields.
Transforms points using stacked tensor field sampling (rotation, translation).
Waits for external PCG graph execution to complete before proceeding.
Applies pluggable action factories to point collections in batch.

delaunay_to_paths.description: Build a Delaunay graph then extract paths for road/river networks

voronoi_parceling.description: Generate land parcels using Voronoi diagrams

pathfinding_network.description: Create navigable path networks through point clouds

cluster_stamping.description: Stamp pre-built clusters at scattered points

growth_simulation.description: Grow organic paths using tensor fields

flood_fill_regions.description: Assign ownership regions via flood fill
